title: Cobblemon into Techverse
description: The Popular Cobblemon mod combied with several Techmods!
body:
Did you ever wanted to play the popular Cobblemon modpack but yet have some friends which are addicted to technic mods?

**Than this is the perfect modpack!**

It combines the most common Technic mods with many extras. (like Mekanism, AE2, ...)
